name: gen-video-tool
description: A local-first Codex video studio with conversational asset generation, WanGP production, F5-TTS narration, candidate review, and deterministic rendering.

interface.shortDescription: Create and run local videos from Codex chat
interface.longDescription: Plan a video in conversation, generate a validated source asset pack with Codex Imagegen, run local WanGP and F5-TTS jobs, review candidates in a private browser studio, and render the final MP4 with a sidecar SRT.
defaultPrompt: 启动 Gen Video Tool，并告诉我本地制作台地址
按我们的工作流做一条 20 秒竖屏视频
检查当前视频项目并继续下一步
